title: Trump buys time for Iran deal after frantic day of diplomacy
summary_full: The US president's decision marked the second time in as many weeks he has backed off a threat to escalate the war, buying more time.
summary_public: The US president's decision marked the second time in as many weeks he has backed off a threat to escalate the war, buying more time.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Trump buys time for Iran deal
